LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER LILIAN CAPULI'S VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE, PROHIBITION OR OTHER APPROPRIATE RELIEF. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO PETITIONER RENEWING HER REQUEST TO RESPONDENT FOR A FULL EVIDENTIARY HEARING UNDER RESPONDENT'S PROPOSED HEARING PROCEDURE. calendar.matters:
Petitioner Lilian Capuli'S Notice Of Hearing Re: Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandate, Prohibition Or Other Appropriate Relief
Off Calendar Aug-25-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER LILIAN CAPULI'S VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE, PROHIBITION OR OTHER APPROPRIATE RELIEF.
Appearances: Tyler M. Paetkau of Hartnett Smith & Associates (650.260.1066) for petitioner and moving party; Arthur A. Hartinger and Nancy Park of Meyers Nave (421.3711) for respondent and opposing party.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petitioner's request for writ of mandate is denied without prejudice to petitioner renewing her request to respondent for a full evidentiary hearing under respondent's proposed hearing procedure. Respondent to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Rhonda Aquilina, CSR 956

Notice Of Hearing Re: Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandate, Prohibition Or Other Appropriate Relief
Off Calendar Aug-15-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. PETITIONER LILIAN CAPULI'S VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE, PROHIBITION OR OTHER APPROPRIATE RELIEF is continued to August 25, 2011 per agreement of the parties. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542
